instructionManifest.title: Code Review Conventions
instructionManifest.scope: Conventions for an agent performing code review on a pull request.

instructionContract.content: Review changes against the repository's stated conventions. Prefer small, evidence-backed comments. Do not introduce private operational detail. Mark speculative suggestions as such.
instructionContract.overrideRules: Lower hierarchyLevel overrides higher. Conflicts with an explicit user instruction are resolved in favor of the user instruction.

receiptRequirements.notes: Reviewer should confirm the packet is candidate status and not adopted guidance.
